topic: Ivory Coast Norway World Cup Knockout

current.headline: Ivory Coast vs Norway: knockout preview and elimination stakes
current.summary: Ivory Coast and Norway head into a World Cup knockout meeting with elimination on the line, and the buildup has centered on whether Nicolas Pepe or Erling Haaland can tilt the tie before extra time or penalties become decisive.

items.headline: Ivory Coast defeat Curacao to progress to knockout stages for first time
items.summary: Ivory Coast ease past Curacao in their World Cup Group E clash courtesy of a Nicolas Pepe brace, confirming their qualification in the knockout stages of the competition for the first time in their history.

items.headline: Norway’s Erling Haaland punishes Iraq with double on World Cup debut
items.summary: Erling Haaland announced Norway's arrival on the biggest stage with a decisive double, offering the clearest recent signal of the attacking threat Ivory Coast must contain in the knockout round.
